From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

American drummer and percussionist

| Kenny Wollesen | |
| --- | --- |
| [Kenny Wollesen at Kings Theatre in Brooklyn, New York, 2016 Photo by Mae Moreno](/wiki/File:Kenny_Wollesen_Drummer.jpg "Kenny Wollesen at Kings Theatre in Brooklyn, New York, 2016 Photo by Mae Moreno") Kenny Wollesen at Kings Theatre in Brooklyn, New York, 2016 Photo by Mae Moreno | |
| Background information | |
| Born | (1966-04-09) 9 April 1966 (age 59) |
| Genres | [Avant-garde jazz](/wiki/Avant-garde_jazz "Avant-garde jazz"), [classical](/wiki/Classical_music "Classical music"), [rock](/wiki/Rock_music "Rock music") |
| Occupation | Musician |
| Instruments | Drums, vibraphone, percussion |
| Label | [Tzadik](/wiki/Tzadik_Records "Tzadik Records") |

Musical artist

**Kenny Wollesen** (born 1966) is an American drummer and percussionist.

Wollesen has recorded and toured with [Tom Waits](/wiki/Tom_Waits "Tom Waits"), [Sean Lennon](/wiki/Sean_Lennon "Sean Lennon"), [Ron Sexsmith](/wiki/Ron_Sexsmith "Ron Sexsmith"), [Bill Frisell](/wiki/Bill_Frisell "Bill Frisell"), [Norah Jones](/wiki/Norah_Jones "Norah Jones"), [John Lurie](/wiki/John_Lurie "John Lurie"), [Myra Melford](/wiki/Myra_Melford "Myra Melford"), [Steven Bernstein](/wiki/Steven_Bernstein_(musician) "Steven Bernstein (musician)"), and [John Zorn](/wiki/John_Zorn "John Zorn"). He is a founding member of the New Klezmer Trio and a member of the [Sex Mob](/wiki/Sex_Mob "Sex Mob") and Himalayas groups.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

He grew up in Capitola, California, studying at Aptos High School, and spending many teenage years playing with [Donny McCaslin](/wiki/Donny_McCaslin "Donny McCaslin"). He spent quality classroom time with flugelhornist and arranger Ray Brown at Cabrillo College. He also arranges and studied vibraphone at Cabrillo.

Wollesen utilizes the [Burton grip](/wiki/Burton_grip "Burton grip") when playing vibraphone.

## Discography

* 2011 *Graylen Epicenter*, [David Binney](/wiki/David_Binney "David Binney")
* 2012 *Howie 61*, [Wayne Krantz](/wiki/Wayne_Krantz "Wayne Krantz")
* 2013 *Another Life*, [James Maddock](/wiki/James_Maddock "James Maddock")
* 2013 *Ghost on Ghost*, [Iron & Wine](/wiki/Iron_%26_Wine "Iron & Wine")
* 2014 *Natalie Merchant*, [Natalie Merchant](/wiki/Natalie_Merchant "Natalie Merchant")
